title: Rosemary hair oil
subtitle: A lightweight scalp and hair oil with rosemary essential oil at 2% in a jojoba or argan base
excerpt: Rosemary essential oil in a carrier oil base is one of the most consistently recommended scalp treatments in natural beauty making. The oil is anhydrous, requires no preservative, and has a 12-month shelf life. Apply to the scalp, massage in, and either leave for 30 minutes or use overnight.
sourceNotes: Rosemary essential oil usage rates from IFRA and standard aromatherapy references. Carrier oil selection from natural cosmetics formulation guides.

recipe.batchNotes: Scale proportionally. Make in the bottle you plan to use.
recipe.makeAheadNotes: Ready immediately. No cure or waiting time required.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 12 months. The limiting factor is the carrier oil. Jojoba is the most stable choice. Discard if the oil smells rancid.

recipeTools.notes: Accurate to 0.1 g for essential oils
Amber or cobalt blue; light degrades essential oils

glossaryTerms.definition: A vegetable or nut oil used to dilute essential oils to a safe concentration for skin contact. Carrier oils also provide their own conditioning properties; jojoba is technically a liquid wax and is exceptionally stable.
Containing no water. Anhydrous products (oils, balms, butters) do not support microbial growth and do not require a preservative, as long as water is not introduced during use.
The percentage of essential oil in a finished product. A 2% dilution rate (20 drops per 100 ml, or 2 g per 100 g) is the standard recommended maximum for leave-on scalp products.
A fat-soluble antioxidant added to oil-based products to extend shelf life by reducing oxidation. Used at 0.5% of the total oil weight.

content.text: plus rosemary essential oil at the standard leave-on

at 0.5% extends the shelf life of the carrier oil. Jojoba is the recommended base as it is the most oxidatively stable of the common hair oils. Argan is a fine alternative with a slightly higher oleic acid content that suits dry, coarse hair. Shelf life is 12 months. No preservative is required as there is no water phase.

items.prepNote: 2% of formula; approximately 80 drops per 100 g

content.text: Weigh the jojoba oil into the dark glass bottle using a funnel. Add the vitamin E oil. Add the rosemary essential oil. Cap the bottle and swirl gently to combine. Label with the date and ingredients.

To use: apply 4 to 6 drops to the fingertips and massage into the scalp. Distribute any remainder through the lengths of the hair. Leave for a minimum of 30 minutes before washing out, or apply to dry hair before bed and wash in the morning.

Store in the dark glass bottle in a cool, dark place. Shelf life is 12 months. The scent of the carrier oil changing from neutral to sharp or unpleasant is the primary indicator of rancidity. Discard at that point.
